# Dahab — Private Banking Ledger

> Dahab (ذهب, "gold") is a private banking ledger for families and businesses in Libya, built on double-entry precision and gold-standard auditability.

Dahab provides a customer portal for account holders and a back-office for Dahab staff (admins, tellers, auditors). It supports multi-currency accounts (LYD, USD, EUR, GBP), vault custody, transaction approvals, and full audit trails.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Choose between the Customer Portal and the Dahab Family staff back-office.
- [Sign in](/login): Sign in to the customer portal or back-office.
- [Customer portal](/portal): Account holder portal with balances, statements, and transfers.
- [About](/app/about): About Dahab and backend diagnostics.

## Optional

- [Mobile teller](/m): Field teller app for Dahab staff.
- [Forgot password](/forgot-password): Recover your Dahab account.
